items.summary: In the FingeringEditor component (or SampleUploadManager where presets are created), when the user clicks 'Save as Preset', display an inline text input field directly within the editor UI that allows the user to type a name for the new preset before confirming the save. The save action should only complete once a non-empty name is provided. This replaces any previous flow that skipped naming or used a popup dialog.

Add a sheet music upload feature that accepts PNG/JPG image files of printed sheet music. When an image is uploaded, parse/extract the musical notes from the image using a client-side or available parsing approach, convert them to the app's internal note format (pitch, duration), and load the resulting note sequence into the current composition so the app can play it back on the ocarina.

Add a sheet music upload feature that accepts MusicXML (.xml, .musicxml) and MIDI (.mid, .midi) file formats. Parse the file client-side to extract note pitches and durations, map them to the ocarina's supported note range (clamping or transposing notes outside the current preset's octave range), and load the resulting sequence into the current composition for playback.
